channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in C++ (Weekly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in C++ nel periodo weekly.

item.title: 📝 hicode002/qualcomm_gbl_exploit_poc (647 ⭐)
item.description:

📝 Repository: hicode002/qualcomm_gbl_exploit_poc

item.title: 📝 Midrags/SFF (18 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Midrags

📝 Repository: Midrags/SFF

📄 Descrizione: Open-source SteamForge Fetcher (SFF): A tool to set up games for Steam using Lua scripts, manifests, and GreenLuma. Enables DLC unlocking, multiplayer fixes, and Steam patching without cracking Steam. Features parallel downloads, backups, and more. Modified from original SMD by jericjan. Use at your own risk.

⭐ Stelle: 18

🍴 Forks: 1

💻 Linguaggio: C

📜 Licenza: GNU General Public License v3.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-02-22T20:12:14Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-02-28T01:23:00Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.description:

📝 Repository: The-POOM/the_poom

📄 Descrizione: POOM is an open-source multitool platform built to Pentest. Play. Create. It is designed for makers, security learners, gamers, and engineers who want a compact device capable of real embedded workflows across wireless security, data capture, automation, and interaction.

item.title: 📝 davitotty/webzero (12 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: davitotty

📝 Repository: davitotty/webzero

📄 Descrizione: Ultra-minimal web server for low-end hardware. Serves static sites from a single .web binary bundle with zero runtime dependencies, zero heap allocations, and zero config. Runs on Linux 2.6+ and Windows XP+. 5,000 req/sec on a Pentium III.

⭐ Stelle: 12

🍴 Forks: 1

💻 Linguaggio: C

📜 Licenza: Other

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-12T17:37:57Z

item.description:
👤 Owner: camenduru

📝 Repository: camenduru/klein.c

📄 Descrizione: klein.c is a compressed pure C implementation of iris.c for text-to-image generation using FLUX.2 Klein transformer models. Built specifically for Windows with native Win32 GUI support.

item.title: 📝 iacobucci/spl (10 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: iacobucci

📝 Repository: iacobucci/spl

📄 Descrizione: A C library for building parsers, by defining non-left-recursive rules in a context-free grammar and composing them with combinators, and operating on the resulting abstract syntax trees.
